data.name: College Gay Sex - Episode 5
data.detailed_description:
An erotic VISUAL NOVEL featuring HD graphics, steamy ANIMATIONS, and realistic-looking characters.
Cody's gay adventure continues with a steamy ménage at the spa when he and Jax challenge the handsome receptionist to join them in the sauna.

GAME DESCRIPTION

EPISODE 5

Cody receives a voucher for a relaxing day at a downtown spa and eagerly plans to go. However, it’s meant for couples, so he needs a partner. Turning to his housemate Jax, he convinces him to play the role of his boyfriend, promising sexual favors later. Together, they head off to the spa, looking forward to a peaceful day.
But their day of pampering and relaxation takes a wild turn when they encounter Leo, the spa's handsome receptionist. Unable to resist their mischievous impulses, Cody and Jax attempt to seduce him, daring Leo to join them in the sauna for some steamy fun.
Will Leo give in to their charms and accept their invitation?
Follow their story and find out.

FEATURES

- HD renders and animations
- Video and image gallery

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
